positive: A whimsical and stylized celestial forest scene, depicting massive, bioluminescent mushrooms and glowing flora under a twilight sky. The style is clean line art mixed with vibrant digital watercolor, resembling Art Nouveau aesthetics. Focus on deep indigos, electric blues, emerald greens, and soft lavender. Composition should be centrally organized with negative space for text overlay, featuring strong, curved organic silhouettes (mushrooms, winding roots, glowing lanterns). Cinematic, high-contrast lighting emphasizes the glow of the flora. Print-ready vector quality, isolated on a clean white background for easy apparel placement, hyperdetailed, symmetry.
negative: blurry, ugly, low detail, watermark, text, signatures, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, noise, grain, jpeg artifacts, solid black, solid white, logo, trademark, celebrity, copyrighted
